name: codex-storyboard
description: Create storyboard rows, process image and video generation tasks, and return assets to the local Codex storyboard.

interface.shortDescription: Generate and return storyboard image and video assets.
interface.longDescription: Codex Storyboard connects Codex to a local multi-project storyboard task queue. Read pending shots, honor each project's aspect ratio, route them to Image Generation, HyperFrames, or Remotion, and return rendered assets to the correct project and row.
defaultPrompt: Process all pending Codex storyboard generation tasks.
Generate the pending storyboard image assets and return them to the storyboard.
Generate the pending HyperFrames or Remotion shots and return the rendered videos.
